movement.name: Swift
movement.description: Movement speed increased by half your Tier (rounded up). Traverse the battlefield quicker.

movement.name: Skirmisher
movement.description: Does not trigger Punish Attacks for moving. +1 space melee attack reach. Maneuver through enemy lines freely.

movement.name: Behemoth
movement.description: Cannot be Grabbed, Moved, knocked Prone, or Stunned. Consistent positioning regardless of enemy interference.

movement.name: Vanguard
movement.description: Enemies that start their turn next to you have their movement speed halved until the start of their next turn. As part of a reaction Punish attack, you may move up to your full movement speed towards the target until the end of their turn. Enhanced zone control and battlefield presence.

movement.name: Mole
movement.description: Move your full speed through soft materials (dirt, clay, loose rock). Move half your speed through hard materials (concrete, granite, packed rock). Choose: Create permanent tunnels OR temporary paths. Cannot end turn underground without tunnel creation.

alternativeMovement.name: Flight
alternativeMovement.description: Move in any direction, ignore ground obstacles, no terrain penalties.

alternativeMovement.name: Teleportation
alternativeMovement.description: Instant movement to visible locations. -2 sp movement penalty.

alternativeMovement.name: Portal
alternativeMovement.description: Create a pair of linked portals within your movement range, anyone can move and act through them, they persist until the start of your next turn.

alternativeMovement.name: Swinging
alternativeMovement.description: Move to any point that has a stable surface you can connect to and you can move your full speed on any solid surface. +1 sp at Tiers 1-6 then +2 sp at Tiers 7+.

alternativeMovement.name: Super Jump
alternativeMovement.description: You can jump up to your full movement speed in one leap. +1 sp at Tiers 1-6 then +2 sp at Tiers 7+.

attackType.name: Single Target
attackType.description: Gain Melee AND Ranged attack types for 0p. Specializes in single-target elimination. Most versatile combat approach.

attackType.name: AOE Specialist
attackType.description: Gain AOE attack type for 0p. Excels at crowd control and managing multiple targets. Weaker than single target but hits many.

attackType.name: Direct Specialist
attackType.description: Gain Direct attack type for 0p. Reliable effect delivery that cannot be dodged. Perfect for consistent results.

effectType.name: Damage Specialist
effectType.description: Focus purely on dealing damage. Maximum damage potential. Can still use Basic Conditions as separate attacks.

effectType.name: Hybrid Specialist
effectType.description: All attacks MUST combine damage and conditions. Mandatory Hybrid Attacks. Versatile but less powerful in each aspect.

effectType.name: Crowd Control
effectType.description: Free access to 2 Advanced condition effects (chosen at selection). Trade-off: -Tier to all Damage rolls. Specializes in enemy control and debilitation. Strong team support role.

uniqueAbility.name: Versatile Master
uniqueAbility.description: Gain 2 Quick Actions per turn. When you select this archetype or advance Tiers, select a number of Primary Actions equal to half your Tier rounded up. You can use each of those Primary Actions as Quick Actions. At Tier 8: Gain a third Quick Action.

uniqueAbility.name: Extraordinary
uniqueAbility.description: Additional points: (Tier - 2) × 15 added to main pool. Can only spend up to (Tier - 2) × 15 points on Flaws or Traits. For characters seeking to specialize in Unique Abilities.

uniqueAbility.name: Cut Above
uniqueAbility.description: Universal stat bonuses to all core stats: Accuracy, Damage, Conditions, Avoidance, Durability, Resistances, Initiative, Movement. Tiers 1-4: +1 to all | Tiers 5-7: +2 to all | Tiers 8+: +3 to all. For straightforward characters.

defensive.name: Stalwart
defensive.description: Subtract your Tier from your Avoidance Score. Choose Physical OR Non-Physical damage: take half damage from that type. Specialized damage resistance.

defensive.name: Fortress
defensive.description: Add your Tier again to Durability. Consistent protection against all damage.

defensive.name: Resilient
defensive.description: Add your Tier to all three Secondary Resistances (Resolve, Stability, Vitality). Exceptional at resisting condition effects.

defensive.name: Immutable
defensive.description: Choose one Secondary Resistance type. You gain complete immunity in that resistance type. Unshakeable defense against specific attacks.

defensive.name: Juggernaut
defensive.description: Increase your maximum Health Pool by 5 × Tier. Extra health reserves for attrition warfare.

specialAttack.name: Normal
specialAttack.description: Select 3 Specialty Upgrades at half cost. Limits provide Points × (Tier ÷ 6). Maximum customization flexibility.

specialAttack.name: Specialist
specialAttack.description: Must select 3 specific Limits for all attacks. Limits provide Points × (Tier ÷ 3). Higher return but restricted playstyle.

specialAttack.name: Paragon
specialAttack.description: Each special attack receives 10 × Tier points. Cannot take Limits. Consistent performance without drawbacks.

specialAttack.name: One Trick
specialAttack.description: Single attack with Tier × 20 points. Cannot take Limits. High-risk, high-reward specialization.

specialAttack.name: Straightforward
specialAttack.description: Choose single Limit for all attacks. Limit returns Points × (Tier ÷ 2). Simple but effective approach.

specialAttack.name: Shared Uses
specialAttack.description: 10 shared uses among abilities, each attack costs 1-3 uses. Regenerate 1 Use per turn. Tier × 5 point discount per use, cannot take Limits.

specialAttack.name: Dual-Natured
specialAttack.description: Two distinct Special Attacks, each gets 15 × Tier points. Cannot take Limits. Balanced versatility.

specialAttack.name: Basic
specialAttack.description: Tier × 10 points for base attack improvements only. No special attacks. Good for builds that use base attack.

utility.name: Specialized
utility.description: Gain double Tier bonus for one core stat. Cannot purchase additional Expertise. Base utility pool: 5 × (Tier - 2).

utility.name: Practical
utility.description: Standard access to all utility options. No restrictions or bonuses. Base utility pool: 5 × (Tier - 1).

utility.name: Jack of All Trades
utility.description: Adds Tier bonus to ALL skill checks. Cannot purchase specialized Expertise. Base utility pool: 5 × (Tier - 2).
